title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 16: The Divine and Demonic Natures
description: Chapter 16 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna distinguishes the divine nature (fearlessness, purity, charity) from the demonic (hypocrisy, arrogance, anger).
introduction: Chapter 16 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna distinguishes the divine nature (fearlessness, purity, charity) from the demonic (hypocrisy, arrogance, anger).

translation.text: Fearlessness, purity of heart, steadfastness in knowledge and yoga — these are the divine qualities.
